mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_reply (content, user_id, topic_id) VALUES (#{content}, #{userId}, #{topicId})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username, CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM forum_like l WHERE l.reply_id = r.id AND l.user_id = #{userId} ) ELSE FALSE END as is_liked FROM forum_reply r LEFT JOIN forum_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.topic_id = #{topicId} ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
SELECT r.*, u.username FROM forum_reply r LEFT JOIN forum_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forum_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND reply_id = #{replyId}
mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.user_id as userId, l.reply_id as replyId, r.content as replyContent, u.username as replyUsername, t.id as topicId, t.title as topicTitle, r.likes_count as likesCount, l.created_at as createdAt FROM forum_like l INNER JOIN forum_reply r ON l.reply_id = r.id INNER JOIN forum_user u ON r.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN forum_topic t ON r.topic_id = t.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND t.status != 'deleted' ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
